ground_truth.title: Tutors in Houston, Texas - Free 24/7
ground_truth.main_content:
Free online tutoring in Houston. Get free tutoring for eligible students across Houston neighborhoods—from Third Ward to Alief, Gulfton to East End. 24/7 academic and homework help for grades 6–12 from expert online tutors.

Why Choose Online Tutoring in Houston?
- Free tutoring for all low-income middle and high school students
- Get one-on-one support from a personalized tutor
- 24/7 homework help available for middle and high school students across Houston
- Flexible, on-demand tutoring with no need to schedule appointments
- Build self-confidence and motivation to succeed in school
- Receive support outside of class

Houston is home to one of the largest and most diverse school districts in the country! The Houston Independent School District (HISD) serves over 190,000 students across more than 270 schools. But only about 24% of HISD students meet grade-level expectations in math, and only around 45% do so in reading. With over 80% of students qualifying for free or reduced-price lunch, the need for accessible academic support is urgent. UPchieve comes in to close that gap by reaching students who face barriers to academic resources. Studies show that using UPchieve just 9 times can lead to meaningful improvements in student performance.

How UPchieve's Online Tutoring Works:
Step 1: Join UPchieve by creating an account and signing-in
Step 2: Choose the subject you need help in and connect with a free online tutor within 5-10 minutes
Step 3: Work with your academic coach in our virtual classroom, using tools like a whiteboard and optional voice chat

15+ Topics Houston Tutors Can Help With:
Math: 6th-12th grade math, Integrated Math 1-4, AP Math, Statistics, Algebra, Geometry, Pre-Algebra, Pre-Calculus, Calculus
Science: 6th-12th grade science, AP Science, Chemistry, Physics, Biology
English: 6th-12th grade English, AP English
SAT: Critical Reading, Math Problem-Solving, Mental Math, Time Management, Test-Taking Strategies, Stress Management
College Essay: "Why Us" Essay, Common App Essay, Personal Essay, Internship and Scholarship Application Essays

Areas We Serve: Third Ward, Alief, Gulfton, East End, Sharpstown, Heights, Sunnyside, Kashmere Gardens, Acres Homes, Westbury, Spring Branch, Midtown Houston, Museum District, Independence Heights, Montrose, Greater Fifth Ward, Greenspoint, Bellaire, Meyerland, Briar Forest, Denver Harbor, Garden Oaks, University Place, West Oaks, Energy Corridor, Northside Houston

Houston Tutoring FAQs:
- How much does a tutor in Houston cost? A local Houston tutor can cost $20 to $60 per hour. UPchieve provides 100% free tutoring for students who attend Title 1 middle and high schools or live in low-income neighborhoods.
- Why is UPchieve's tutoring free? Our mission is to ensure every student gets the support they need to graduate high school and get into college.
- How do I schedule a tutoring session? Skip scheduling—with UPchieve, you can create a free account, log in, and get matched with a tutor in under 10 minutes.
- How many tutors are available? UPchieve has dozens of tutors based in Houston and thousands more worldwide.
- What are the pros of using an online tutor? You can study from your home, library, or anywhere with Wi-Fi! On-demand help whether it's 2 pm or 2 am.

Get your own online tutor, at no cost… ever!
